title: festuca brachystachys
intro: Festuca brachystachys, also known as short-spike fescue, is a species of grass native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Festuca brachystachys include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
